Preconditions: User is on SauceDemo login page. Valid credentials are available.
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter valid username
3. Enter valid password
4. Click 'Login' button
Expected:
- User is successfully authenticated
- User is redirected to the inventory page
- Product listings are visible
- URL contains '/inventory.html'
Actual:
-User is authenticated
-User is redirected to inventory page
- Product listings are visible
- URL contains /inventory.html

Preconditions:
User is on SauceDemo login page.
Invalid password needs to be put in.
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter valid username
3. Enter invalid password 
4. Click 'Login' button
Expected:
- User is not authenticated
- Page gives user error
- Page will let user to try again
Actual:
-User is unable to login
- Page lets user know the credentials are invalid
- Page lets user try again

Preconditions: User is on SauceDemo login page. Invalid username must be put in.

Expected:

Preconditions: User is on SauceDemo login page. The credential fields are empty when login button is clicked.

2. Enter either or both no username, no password
3. Click 'Login' button
Expected:
- User is not authenticated
- Error message is given to user to enter credentials
- Page lets user try again
Actual:

Preconditions: User is on SauceDemo login page. The credentials used is for a locked account.
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Enter locked out username
3. Enter valid password 
4. Click 'Login' button
Expected:
- User is not authenticated
- Page lets user know their account is locked.
- Page will let user to try again with different credentials.
Actual:
-User is unable to login
- Page lets user know the account is locked.
- Page lets user try again

Preconditions: User is logged in SauceDemo page and is at /inventory.html
Steps:
1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
2. Login with credentials
3. Arrive at /inventory.html
Expected:
- User is able to see thumbnails and titles for all products
- Thumbnails and titles belong correctly to their descriptions
Actual:
- Thumbnails are not valid to their item titles and descriptions
- Description for Sauce Labs Backpack contains unexecuted method within descriptions instead of an output text
- Title for T-Shirt (RED) contains unexecuted method instead of output text

Preconditions: User is logged in SauceDemo page and is at /inventory.html
Steps:
1. At /inventory.html
2. Click on four sort button, A-Z, Z-A, Price High-Low, Low-High
Expected: - Items are sorted per their sorting conditions
Actual: - Sorting works as intended and is sorted per sorting conditions
